'''鈭歮-l-th''' ('''malatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbelappe|umbelappe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbelappe|umbelappe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-l-th
|-
! Lemma
| malatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:malathithi|malathithi]] || [[word:malathiji|malathiji]] || [[word:malathishi|malathishi]] || [[word:malathi|malathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:malathuthuth|malathuthuth]] || [[word:malathujuj|malathujuj]] || [[word:malathushush|malathushush]] || [[word:malath|malath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:malathuthu|malathuthu]] || [[word:malathuju|malathuju]] || [[word:malathushu|malathushu]] || [[word:malathu|malathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:malathufuth|malathufuth]] || [[word:malathufuj|malathufuj]] || [[word:malathufush|malathufush]] || [[word:malathuf|malathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:malathethe|malathethe]] || [[word:malatheje|malatheje]] || [[word:malatheshe|malatheshe]] || [[word:malathe|malathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:malathothoth|malathothoth]] || [[word:malathojoj|malathojoj]] || [[word:malathoshosh|malathoshosh]] || [[word:malath|malath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:malathotho|malathotho]] || [[word:malathojo|malathojo]] || [[word:malathosho|malathosho]] || [[word:malatho|malatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:malathofoth|malathofoth]] || [[word:malathofoj|malathofoj]] || [[word:malathofosh|malathofosh]] || [[word:malathof|malathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:malath忙th忙|malath忙th忙]] || [[word:malath忙j忙|malath忙j忙]] || [[word:malath忙sh忙|malath忙sh忙]] || [[word:malath忙|malath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:malathathath|malathathath]] || [[word:malathajaj|malathajaj]] || [[word:malathashash|malathashash]] || [[word:malath|malath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:malathatha|malathatha]] || [[word:malathaja|malathaja]] || [[word:malathasha|malathasha]] || [[word:malatha|malatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:malathafath|malathafath]] || [[word:malathafaj|malathafaj]] || [[word:malathafash|malathafash]] || [[word:malathaf|malathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:malathasha|malathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomalathasha|gomalathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimalathasha|gokimalathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:malathn眉sha|malathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomalathnkn眉sha|gomalathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimalathn眉sha|gokimalathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:malathsh毛sha|malathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomalathnksh毛sha|gomalathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimalathsh毛sha|gokimalathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:malathrosha|malathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalathnkrosha|gomalathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalathrosha|gokimalathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:malathmusha|malathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalathnkmusha|gomalathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalathmusha|gokimalathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:malathsherasha|malathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomalathnksherasha|gomalathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimalathsherasha|gokimalathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:malathngasha|malathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomalathnkngasha|gomalathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimalathngasha|gokimalathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:malathyasha|malathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomalathnkyasha|gomalathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimalathyasha|gokimalathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:malathyamasha|malathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomalathnkyamasha|gomalathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimalathyamasha|gokimalathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:malathn眉sh毛sha|malathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomalathnkn眉sh毛sha|gomalathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimalathn眉sh毛sha|gokimalathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:malathn眉rosha|malathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalathnkn眉rosha|gomalathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalathn眉rosha|gokimalathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malathn眉musha|malathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalathnkn眉musha|gomalathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalathn眉musha|gokimalathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:malathsh毛n眉sha|malathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomalathnksh毛n眉sha|gomalathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimalathsh毛n眉sha|gokimalathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:malathsh毛rosha|malathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalathnksh毛rosha|gomalathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalathsh毛rosha|gokimalathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malathsh毛musha|malathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalathnksh毛musha|gomalathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalathsh毛musha|gokimalathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:malathron眉sha|malathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomalathnkron眉sha|gomalathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimalathron眉sha|gokimalathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:malathrosh毛sha|malathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomalathnkrosh毛sha|gomalathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimalathrosh毛sha|gokimalathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malathromusha|malathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalathnkromusha|gomalathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalathromusha|gokimalathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:malathmun眉sha|malathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomalathnkmun眉sha|gomalathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimalathmun眉sha|gokimalathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:malathmush毛sha|malathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomalathnkmush毛sha|gomalathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimalathmush毛sha|gokimalathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:malathmurosha|malathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomalathnkmurosha|gomalathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimalathmurosha|gokimalathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:malath|malath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙l忙th|m忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homalath|homalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙l忙th|hom忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomalath|hohomalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙l忙th|hohom忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉malath|n眉malath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙l忙th|n眉m忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉malath|n眉n眉malath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙l忙th|n眉n眉m忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂malath|n茂malath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙l忙th|n茂m忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂malath|n茂n茂malath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙l忙th|n茂n茂m忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumalath|lumalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙l忙th|lum忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumalath|lulumalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙l忙th|lulum忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limalath|limalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙l忙th|lim忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimalath|lilimalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙l忙th|lilim忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komalath|komalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙l忙th|kom忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomalath|kokomalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙l忙th|kokom忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemalath|kemalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙l忙th|kem忙l忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemalath|kekemalath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙l忙th|kekem忙l忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
